response.justification: Bogdan is a strong polyglot engineer with 15+ years of professional experience, clear TypeScript/Node.js depth, and—critically—current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which directly satisfies one of the harder-to-find requirements. His TDD discipline, cloud exposure (AWS CDK), and database breadth (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL) cover most of the required stack. The primary gaps are NestJS (not mentioned anywhere), the specified testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright are absent; his testing library work is D-language specific), and Kotlin. These are learnable for a developer of his caliber, making him a strong interview candidate despite the stack delta.
strengths: Active AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience at re:cinq, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js career thread across re:cinq, Optilyz, and RIDE Capital, with React usage and AWS CDK in production
Demonstrated TDD culture and testing advocacy—ran workshops, created test libraries, practiced trunk-based development
concerns: NestJS, the primary backend framework for this role, is entirely absent from the resume
None of the required testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are mentioned; existing testing experience centers on D-language tooling
Kotlin is not listed despite being a secondary technology requirement; only Java appears, and only briefly
